# AstrologyX

> AstrologyX is a precision astrology app for iPhone, published by Vibes LLC. It generates personalized daily horoscopes, full birth chart readings, and real-time planetary transit insights — all calculated from NASA ephemeris data and tailored to each user's unique chart.

## At a glance

- Platform: iOS 16+ (iPhone)
- Languages: English, Russian
- Price: Free with optional in-app purchase
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id1449148271
- Current version: 1.23.4
- Publisher: Vibes LLC
- Data source: NASA ephemeris / star-position data

## Core features

- Personalized daily horoscopes, individually calculated from each user's birth chart and current planetary transits
- Full birth chart (natal chart) with clear, beginner-friendly interpretations of planets, houses, aspects, and rising sign
- Real-time planetary transit tracking
- Synastry compatibility analysis between two birth charts

## Positioning

AstrologyX differs from generic sun-sign horoscope apps by individually calculating every reading from the user's specific birth chart, planetary transits, and aspects. It is positioned as a precise, calm, distraction-free iOS-native astrology tool — designed for everyday personal guidance rather than passive entertainment.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://astrologyx.com/): product overview, core features, FAQ
- [Frequently asked questions](https://astrologyx.com/#faq): what AstrologyX is, accuracy, NASA data, birth charts, synastry, comparison to Co-Star and The Pattern, Android availability
- [Privacy policy](https://astrologyx.com/privacy-policy/)
- [Terms of use](https://astrologyx.com/terms-of-use/)
- [App Store listing](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1449148271)
